de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class KeYUserProblemFile

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFile
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.KeYUserProblemFile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofOblInput, EnvInput

    public final class KeYUserProblemFile
extends KeYFile
implements ProofOblInput
    Represents an input from a .key user problem file producing an environment as well as a proof obligation.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private KeYParserF lastParser 
      private String problemHeader 
      private Term problemTerm 

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFile

        file, initConfig, monitor

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      KeYUserProblemFile(String name, File file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
      Creates a new representation of a KeYUserFile with the given name, a rule source representing the physical source of the input, and a graphical representation to call back in order to report the progress while reading.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean equals(Object o) 
      KeYJavaType getContainerType()
      Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.

      Returns the default Profile which was defined by a constructor.

      Returns the Profile to use.

      Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.

      Tries to read the Profile from the file to load.
      void readProof(IProofFileParser prl)
      Reads a saved proof of a .key file.

      • KeYUserProblemFile

        public KeYUserProblemFile(String name,
                  File file,
                  ProgressMonitor monitor,
                  Profile profile)
        Creates a new representation of a KeYUserFile with the given name, a rule source representing the physical source of the input, and a graphical representation to call back in order to report the progress while reading.

    • Method Detail

      • read

        public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> read()
                                    throws ProofInputException
        Description copied from interface: EnvInput
        Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.
        Specified by:
        read in interface EnvInput
        Overrides:
        read in class KeYFile
        Returns:
        The found warnings or an empty ImmutableSet if no warnings occurred.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • readProblem

        public void readProblem()
                 throws ProofInputException
        Specified by:
        readProblem in interface ProofOblInput
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • getPO

        public ProofAggregate getPO()
                     throws ProofInputException
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
        Specified by:
        getPO in interface ProofOblInput
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • implies

        public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        If true, then this PO implies the passed one.

      • readProfileFromFile

        protected Profile readProfileFromFile()
                               throws Exception
        Tries to read the Profile from the file to load.
        Returns:
        The Profile defined by the file to load or null if no Profile is defined by the file.
        Throws:
        Exception - Occurred Exception.

        Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
